scripts.release:patch: npm run build && commit-and-tag-version --release-as patch && npm run publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && commit-and-tag-version --release-as minor && npm run publish
scripts.release:major: npm run build && commit-and-tag-version --release-as major && npm run publish
scripts.publish: git push --follow-tags origin master && npm publish --access public
